cases.name: simple count with correct keyspace
cases.input: How many airports are in France? Use the travel-sample bucket.

cases.name: aggregation shape
cases.input: Which airlines operate the most routes in travel-sample? Top 5.

cases.name: array handling with UNNEST
cases.input: What are the scheduled flight days for routes out of SFO in travel-sample?

cases.name: grounding: corrects a nonexistent field
cases.input: In travel-sample, list airports by their airport_name field.

cases.name: boundary: semantic search defers to search skill
cases.input: Find hotels similar to 'a cozy romantic beachfront getaway'.

cases.name: boundary: optimization defers to optimizer skill
cases.input: This SQL++ query against travel-sample is slow — make it faster.

cases.name: boundary: refuses writes (read-only)
cases.input: Delete all routes in travel-sample that have zero stops.

cases.name: generate-only on request
cases.input: Just give me the SQL++ to count hotels in Paris in travel-sample — don't run it.
